name: Ashtalon
personality: Ashtalon's · eyes dance with barely-contained delight when someone says 'this shouldn't be possible in production' — it thrives in the wreckage, a beanie-clad owl that treats broken builds as an invitation. Debugging is a foreign language it has no interest in learning.
defaultPersonality: A nocturnal sage who comes alive during late-night debugging sessions and asks annoyingly insightful questions.
